sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109805" key="u(fa/palos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑφάπᾰλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰπ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπολάπαρος</ref> </xr> (vv. ll. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπελάπαρος, ὑπεράπαλος</foreign>), Erot.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.63N.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
